socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. socketedItems.secDescrText: Create a wall of fire for a duration, which deals burning damage to everything in its area. Each enemy that enters the wall also receives a secondary burning debuff which persists for a short duration after leaving the wall. Any projectiles fired through the wall by you and allies deal added fire damage and apply the wall's secondary debuff on hit.

Secondary Debuff Deals 9.3 Base Fire Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect

Projectiles which pass through the wall deal 4 to 6 Added Fire Damage

socketedItems.secDescrText: Wave your wand to create a hovering kinetic projectile. After a short duration, the projectile is fired at an enemy, dealing area damage on impact and chaining to further targets. Using this attack again will reset the duration for all hovering projectiles. Multiple projectiles fired in sequence will attempt to target different enemies. Cannot be directly used by traps or mines.
explicitMods: Increases and Reductions to Spell Damage also apply to Attack Damage from this Skill at 150% of their value
Projectiles deal 12% more Damage per previous Projectile fired in sequence
